docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOUSA, PAULO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHARESTATES INVESTMENTS, LLC JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-18-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHARESTATES INVESTMENTS, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,095.14 FILED BY SOUSA, PAULO AS TO DEFENDANT SHARESTATES INVESTMENTS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOUSA, PAULO AS TO DEFENDANT SHARESTATES INVESTMENTS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF PAULO SOUSA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. DEFENDANT SHARESTATES INVESTMENTS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
